day7.subject: We miss you!
day7.title: We Miss You!
day7.body: We noticed you haven't played in a while. Your puzzles are waiting for you!

day14.subject: Here's what's new at Puzzled!
day14.title: New Puzzles Waiting For You!
day14.body: It's been a couple of weeks since we've seen you. We've been busy creating new challenges just for you!

day30.subject: Come back with 50% OFF Premium!
day30.title: Special Offer Just For You!
day30.subtitle: We'd love to have you back
day30.body: We miss having you as part of the Puzzled community! As a special thank you for being a valued member, we're offering you 50% OFF your first month of Premium.
day30.fullArchive: Full Puzzle Archive - Access past daily puzzles anytime
day30.streakProtection: Streak Freeze Protection - Never lose your progress
day30.leaderboardAccess: Leaderboard Access - Compete with other players
